auth_prerequisites: Provider credentials are required for meaningful model-backed agent runs.

non_interactive_execution.summary: Public docs and repo messaging describe an installable CLI agent surface.
non_interactive_execution.notes: The candidate exposes a documented external CLI entrypoint.

offline_strategy.summary: Wrapper and parser seams can be exercised with fixtures or a fake goose binary before credentialed runs.
offline_strategy.notes: Recommendation only needs deterministic wrapper evidence, not live provider execution.

observable_cli_surface.summary: The getting-started docs and repo present a public command-line agent surface.
observable_cli_surface.notes: The observable CLI surface is public and reviewable.

redaction_fit.summary: Terminal-first output can be redacted at the repo boundary before persistence.
redaction_fit.notes: This is a repo-fit inference from Goose shipping as an external CLI agent.

crate_first_fit.summary: The external CLI posture aligns with a wrapper-crate-first integration path.
crate_first_fit.notes: The first seam remains process invocation plus event normalization.

reproducibility.summary: Public docs support repeatable local setup while provider-backed evaluation remains a later gated step.
reproducibility.notes: Install and wrapper evidence is reproducible now; provider-backed behavior is deferred.

future_leverage.summary: Goose’s open-source agent posture makes it a strategic contender despite lower packaging evidence than other finalists.
future_leverage.notes: The candidate remains strategically relevant even with thinner public packaging signals.

blocked_steps: Model-backed evaluation still needs maintainer credentials after local CLI setup.
normalized_caveats: Goose is documentable and installable now, but provider-backed behavior belongs to later proving.

evidence.title: Getting Started | goose | Your open source AI agent
evidence.excerpt: Goose docs expose a getting-started track under "Getting Started | goose | Your open source AI agent," grounding install and evaluation guidance.

evidence.title: aaif-goose/goose
evidence.excerpt: GitHub describes goose as "an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM." Repo has 43453 stars and was pushed 2026-04-28T15:17:46Z.

evidence.title: goose docs home
evidence.excerpt: The goose docs home presents goose as an open source AI agent and routes users into the public docs and getting-started flow.

evidence.title: block-goose-cli — Homebrew Formulae
evidence.excerpt: Homebrew publishes block-goose-cli as the installable Goose CLI formula with a stable version and the command brew install block-goose-cli.
